rule: Use smooth scroll for anchor links
do_pattern: Add smooth scrolling behavior to anchor navigation
do_code: html { scroll-behavior: smooth; } or element.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
dont_pattern: Jump instantly to anchors causing disorientation
dont_code: html { scroll-behavior: auto; } with anchor href="#section"

do_pattern: Keep nav visible as users scroll down long pages
do_code: position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; backdrop-filter: blur(8px)
dont_pattern: Navigation disappears on scroll requiring scroll to top
dont_code: position: static on nav with no scroll persistence

do_pattern: Show breadcrumbs for pages 3+ levels deep
dont_pattern: No breadcrumbs on deeply nested pages
dont_code: Missing breadcrumb navigation on category > subcategory > product pages

do_pattern: Use recognizable hamburger icon with aria-label
dont_pattern: Custom abstract icon for mobile menu
dont_code:
···
with no accessibility

do_pattern: Show users which page/section they are on
do_code: nav a[aria-current="page"] { color: var(--primary); border-bottom: 2px solid; }
dont_pattern: No active state indicator on navigation items
dont_code: .nav-link { color: gray; } with no active differentiation

do_pattern: Check and honor prefers-reduced-motion media query
dont_pattern: Ignore motion sensitivity and force all animations
dont_code: Playing all animations regardless of user preference

rule: Keep transitions under 300ms for UI feedback
do_pattern: Use 150-300ms for micro-interactions
do_code: transition: all 200ms ease-out; for hover states and button feedback
dont_pattern: Slow transitions over 500ms that feel sluggish
dont_code: transition: all 800ms ease-in-out; on button hover

do_pattern: Apply natural easing to all animations
dont_pattern: Linear timing feels mechanical and unnatural
dont_code: transition: transform 200ms linear

do_pattern: Animate list items with sequential delays
dont_pattern: All items animate simultaneously losing visual flow
dont_code: All list items with identical animation-delay: 0ms

do_pattern: Use opacity and small transforms for page entrances
dont_pattern: Large dramatic entrance animations that distract
dont_code: @keyframes slideIn { from { transform: translateY(100px); } }

rule: Always use visible labels above inputs
do_pattern: Place text labels above form fields not as placeholders
dont_pattern: Placeholder-only labels that disappear on focus
dont_code: <input placeholder="Email" /> with no label element

rule: Show inline validation errors below the field
do_pattern: Display error messages immediately below the relevant field
dont_pattern: Show all errors at top of form away from fields
dont_code:
Please fix the following...
at page top

do_pattern: Match input type to expected data for mobile keyboards
dont_pattern: Use type="text" for all inputs ignoring mobile optimization
dont_code: <input type="text"> for email phone and number fields

do_pattern: Break long forms into steps with visible progress
do_code: Step 1 of 3 progress bar with completed/current/upcoming states
dont_pattern: One long scrolling form with 15+ fields
dont_code: Single page form with all fields visible overwhelming users

rule: Autofocus first field on form pages
do_pattern: Set focus to the first input when form page loads
dont_pattern: No autofocus requiring users to click into first field
dont_code: Form loads with no focused element

do_pattern: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA contrast requirements
dont_pattern: Low contrast text that is hard to read
dont_code: color: #94a3b8 on background: #f1f5f9 (contrast 2.1:1)

rule: All images must have alt text
do_pattern: Provide descriptive alt text for meaningful images
dont_pattern: Missing alt text on images
dont_code: with no alt attribute

do_pattern: Ensure all clickable elements are keyboard accessible
do_code: <button onclick="..."> or <a href="..."> with visible focus styles
dont_pattern: Clickable div elements with no keyboard support
dont_code: <div onclick="handleClick()" class="card"> with no tabindex or role

do_pattern: Show clear focus indicators for keyboard navigation
dont_pattern: Remove default focus outlines with no replacement
dont_code: *:focus { outline: none; } globally without alternative

do_pattern: Use proper HTML5 semantic elements for structure
dont_pattern: Div soup with no semantic meaning
dont_code: <div class="nav"> <div class="main"> <div class="footer">

do_pattern: Add skip to content link for keyboard users
dont_pattern: No skip link forcing tab through entire navigation
dont_code: Missing skip navigation link on content-heavy pages

do_pattern: Add accessible names to buttons with no visible text
dont_pattern: Icon buttons with no accessible name
dont_code: <button><svg>...</svg></button> with no aria-label or title

rule: Color is not the only indicator
do_pattern: Use icons shapes or text in addition to color for status
do_code: ✕ Error: Invalid email with red color AND icon
dont_pattern: Using only red/green color to indicate error/success
dont_code: Invalid with no icon or additional cue

rule: Lazy load images below the fold
do_pattern: Only load images when they approach the viewport
dont_pattern: Load all images on page load regardless of visibility
dont_code: without loading="lazy" for below-fold images

do_pattern: Serve appropriate image sizes for different screens
dont_pattern: Serve full-size images to all devices
dont_code: for all screen sizes

do_pattern: Use font-display swap to prevent invisible text
dont_pattern: Block rendering until fonts load showing invisible text
dont_code: @font-face { font-display: block; } causing flash of invisible text

do_pattern: Reserve space for dynamic content and images
do_code: or aspect-ratio: 16/9 on containers
dont_pattern: Content shifts as images and ads load
dont_code: with no dimensions causing layout shift

do_pattern: Lazy load page components to reduce initial bundle
do_code: const Page = lazy(() => import('./Page')) with Suspense fallback
dont_pattern: Loading entire app bundle on first page visit
dont_code: import Page from './Page' for all routes in main bundle

do_pattern: Apply consistent sizing ratio across text levels
dont_pattern: Random font sizes with no consistent relationship
dont_code: h1: 36px h2: 28px h3: 19px h4: 17px with no clear ratio

do_pattern: Set comfortable line height for readability
dont_pattern: Tight line height making text hard to read
dont_code: body { line-height: 1.1; } or line-height: 1.0

do_pattern: Constrain paragraph width for readability
dont_pattern: Full-width text spanning entire viewport
dont_code: p { width: 100%; } with no max-width on wide screens

do_pattern: Use clamp() for fluid typography across breakpoints
dont_pattern: Fixed pixel font sizes that don't scale
dont_code: .heading { font-size: 48px; } with no responsive adjustment

rule: Use CSS custom properties for theming
do_pattern: Define color palette as CSS variables for consistency
dont_pattern: Hardcoded hex values scattered throughout CSS
dont_code: background: #2563eb repeated in 47 different selectors

do_pattern: Darken or lighten by consistent amount on hover
do_code: button:hover { background: color-mix(in srgb var(--primary) 85% black); }
dont_pattern: Random hover colors with no relationship to base
dont_code: .btn:hover { background: #random-unrelated-color; }

do_pattern: Test all color combinations against WCAG guidelines
do_code: Primary on white: 4.5:1+ ratio; CTA on dark: 4.5:1+ ratio
dont_pattern: Color combinations that fail contrast checks
dont_code: Yellow text on white background; light gray on white

do_pattern: Apply spacing from a defined scale (4px 8px 12px 16px 24px 32px 48px 64px)
do_code: gap: var(--space-4); padding: var(--space-6); margin-bottom: var(--space-8)
dont_pattern: Random spacing values with no system
dont_code: padding: 13px; margin: 7px; gap: 11px with no consistency

do_pattern: Start with mobile layout and enhance for larger screens
dont_pattern: Desktop-first design that breaks on mobile
dont_code: @media (max-width: 767px) { /* fix mobile */ } as an afterthought

do_pattern: Ensure all interactive elements are large enough for touch
dont_pattern: Small touch targets that are hard to tap on mobile
dont_code: button { padding: 2px 4px; font-size: 11px; } for mobile

do_pattern: Constrain content width for readability on large screens
dont_pattern: Full-width content stretching across ultrawide monitors
dont_code: .content { width: 100%; } with no max-width constraint

do_pattern: Use the same border-radius across similar components
dont_pattern: Mixed border-radius values across similar elements
dont_code: .card-1 { border-radius: 8px; } .card-2 { border-radius: 16px; } .card-3 { border-radius: 4px; }

rule: Hover states on all clickable elements
do_pattern: Provide visual feedback on hover for interactive items
dont_pattern: No hover feedback on clickable elements
dont_code: button { } with no :hover state defined

do_pattern: Show loading indicator during network requests
dont_pattern: No feedback during loading leaving users uncertain
dont_code: <button onClick={submit}>Submit</button> with no loading state

do_pattern: Show content shape placeholders while loading
dont_pattern: Full-page spinner blocking all content
dont_code: covering entire page

do_pattern: Require confirmation before irreversible operations
do_code: Are you sure you want to delete? This cannot be undone. [Cancel] [Delete]
dont_pattern: Immediately execute destructive actions on click
dont_code: onClick={() => deleteAccount()} with no confirmation dialog

do_pattern: Show non-blocking success/error messages
dont_pattern: No feedback after successful action
dont_code: saveData().then(() => {}) with no user notification

do_pattern: Show summary first with option to expand details
dont_pattern: Show all content at once overwhelming users
dont_code: All settings visible on one page with 50+ options

do_pattern: Show guidance when content areas are empty
do_code: No projects yet
dont_pattern: Blank empty pages with no guidance
dont_code: showing nothing when empty

rule: Truncate long text with expand option
do_pattern: Show preview of long content with read more
dont_pattern: Show full paragraphs of text in card listings
dont_code: Full 500-word descriptions visible in every card in a grid
